user_story: As a friend, I want to clone and install so my agent can use the tools.
expected_behavior: bun install at repo root installs cli+mcp workspaces.

user_story: As a friend, I want to get a key so I can publish.
expected_behavior: README: sign in at studio, Settings → Mint key; only ARTIFACT_API_KEY needed (base defaults).
issues: sign-in 200 + mint verified live; README accurate

user_story: As an agent, I want CLI help so I know the commands.
expected_behavior: bun run cli --help prints usage for share/deploy/backend/list/get/delete.

user_story: As an agent, I want to deploy a folder so I get a live multi-file app.
expected_behavior: cli deploy <dir> --slug uploads files, prints artifacts.jasonv.dev/<slug>/.

user_story: As an agent, I want to share a single file so I get a URL.
As an agent, I want a KV backend so my app stores data.
expected_behavior: cli backend <slug> prints a per-app data key.

user_story: As an agent, I want list/get/delete to manage apps.
expected_behavior: list/get/delete hit /v1; get works without a key.
issues: list=18 rows; get no-key ok; delete ok

user_story: As an agent, I want redeploy to update in place.
expected_behavior: cli deploy same --slug updates, prunes removed files, prints updated.

user_story: As a friend, I want it to work with only a key set.
expected_behavior: ARTIFACT_API_BASE defaults to hosted; only ARTIFACT_API_KEY required.
issues: all commands ran key-only, no base

user_story: As an MCP client, I want the server to start and expose tools.
expected_behavior: bun run mcp starts a stdio server with publish_artifact/deploy_app/etc.

user_story: As an external agent, I want share-artifact self-contained (no bws/abs paths).
expected_behavior: public skill is BYO-key, no private deps.

user_story: As an external agent, I want build-artifact-app self-contained.
expected_behavior: no bws, no unresolved wikilinks, soft-deps degrade gracefully.
fix: replaced [[share-artifact]] with plain ref; dropped bws (ARTIFACT_API_KEY only); made brainstorming/frontend-design/make-interfaces optional 'if you have them'; kept the make-interfaces specifics inline; removed an em dash. re-grep clean

user_story: As a friend, I want a worked example I can deploy.
expected_behavior: examples/how-it-works deploys as a site and renders.

user_story: As a friend, I want to install the skills via the registry.
expected_behavior: skills add jpvarbed/artifact-studio-tools finds both skills.
